command_version: GNU Awk 5.3.1, API 4.0, PMA Avon 8-g1, (GNU MPFR 4.2.1, GNU MP 6.3.0)

params.code: "function abs(x){return x<0?-x:x} function ceil(x){return int(x)+(x>int(x))} BEGIN{FS=OFS=\"\\t\"} NR>1{if($2==\"KD\"){kd[++nk]=$3; sk+=$3; ssk+=$3*$3}else if($2==\"CTRL\"){ct[++nc]=$3; sc+=$3; ssc+=$3*$3}; h=($2==\"KD\"?1:0); sx=($4==\"M\"?1:0); y[++N]=$3; H[N]=h; S[N]=sx; I[N]=h*sx} END{for(i=1;i<=N;i++){key=H[i]\",\"S[i]; cnt[key]++; sy[key]+=y[i]; sy2[key]+=y[i]*y[i]}; rssf=0; for(key in cnt){rssf+=sy2[key]-sy[key]*sy[key]/cnt[key]}; for(r=1;r<=3;r++){for(c=1;c<=4;c++)A[r,c]=0}; for(i=1;i<=N;i++){xs[1]=1; xs[2]=H[i]; xs[3]=S[i]; for(r=1;r<=3;r++){A[r,4]+=xs[r]*y[i]; for(c=1;c<=3;c++)A[r,c]+=xs[r]*xs[c]}}; for(k=1;k<=3;k++){p=A[k,k]; for(j=k;j<=4;j++)A[k,j]/=p; for(i=1;i<=3;i++)if(i!=k){f=A[i,k]; for(j=k;j<=4;j++)A[i,j]-=f*A[k,j]}}; rssr=0; for(i=1;i<=N;i++){pred=A[1,4]+A[2,4]*H[i]+A[3,4]*S[i]; rssr+=(y[i]-pred)^2}; F=((rssr-rssf)/1)/(rssf/(N-4)); printf \"%.12g\\n\", F}"
